name: supervised_warmstart_then_round_delta_ppo_v1
hypothesis: Supervised shallow-search warm start followed by paired-baseline-round-delta PPO should improve selection-eval win_delta while keeping rank_delta and margin_delta positive against the current best baseline.

stages.name: generate_trajectories
stages.target_source: legal C-engine states, per-action full-game rollouts over sampled hidden-state determinizations continued by the promoted baseline policy

falsification_rule.selection: Reject or mark inconclusive if the best selected checkpoint lacks nonnegative win_delta CI low or has negative rank_delta/margin_delta guardrails against current best.
falsification_rule.holdout: Run expensive holdout or promotion panels only once on the selected checkpoint; do not tune repeatedly against holdouts.

promotion_readout: paired full-game win_delta primary, rank_delta and margin_delta guardrails
